subject: Faz 5 Tamamlandi: Admin & Analytics Panel
body:
## Uygulama Ozeti

Faz 5 Admin & Analytics Panel eksiksiz uygulanarak main'e merge edildi.

## Yapilan Isler

### Mimari
- Port 5002, Tailwind dark theme (purple accent #a855f7), ApexCharts
- IDbContextFactory pattern - her component kendi DbContext'ini acar/dispose eder
- AdminDataService singleton - tum DB sorgu logic
- ConfigService singleton - in-memory trading parametreler
- Auto-migrate on startup (MigrateAsync)

### Yeni Dosyalar (27 dosya)
- Services/AdminDataService.cs - performance, equity, calibration, trade history, engine status, system logs
- Services/ConfigService.cs - TradingConfig record ile in-memory config
- Layout: MainLayout, NavMenu, NavLinkItem (collapsible w-14 -> w-52), ReconnectModal (ayni)
- Shared: StatCard, SystemStatusBadge (DB ping), ConfigRow
- Charts: AdminEquityChart (ApexCharts Area), CalibrationBucketChart (ApexCharts Bar)
- Pages: PerformancePage, CalibrationPage, TradeHistoryPage (paginasyon+filtre), EngineStatusPage, ConfigPage, SystemLogsPage, NotFound

### Silinen
- Counter.razor, Weather.razor, Home.razor (scaffold)

## Build & Test
- dotnet build Admin: 0 hata, 0 uyari
- dotnet test: 77/77 gecti (Domain: 15, Application: 8, Infrastructure: 54)
- Not: Solution build'de Traxon.Mcp DLL lock (PID 12212 calisyor) - CryptoTrader projeleri OK

## Git
- Branch: feature/phase5-admin -> main (--no-ff merge)
- Commit: 447617a
